description: Inventory CSV -> TXT report with per-category value totals and grand total
prompt_hint: Produce an 'Inventory Report' listing all 5 products. Compute per-category inventory value (qty*unit_price): Hardware=150*9.99+200*4.50+100*2.25=2623.50, Electronics=75*19.99+25*29.99=2249.50. Total = 4873.00.
